FIGHT STRATEGY — Hexaghost
FIGHT TYPE: Boss (spend HP freely but Pantograph gave full HP)
WIN CONDITION: Sustained damage over ~15 turns. No Str scaling so must rely on base attacks + Vulnerable from Bash.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: Block each turn, use Clothesline Weak for Inferno turns, True Grit+ for 9 block + exhaust Burns.
KEY CARDS: Evolve (Burns become draws), Clothesline (Weak for Inferno), True Grit+ (exhaust Burns for block), Bash (Vulnerable), Shrug It Off (block+draw)
POTION PLAN: Colorless Potion if desperate for block/damage. Save for Inferno turns.
RISKS: No Str scaling means slow kill. Long fight = many Inferno cycles. Burns clog without Evolve.
